details.test: Task 1: Set nearest café within 5 miles as favorite store
Task 2: Create new customer account and access dashboard
Task 3: Schedule medium latte pickup closest to 8:30 AM tomorrow
Task 4: Reorder cheapest large drink from past orders
Task 5: Add new payment card and set as default
Task 6: Redeem bakery reward under $5 with 4+ stars
Task 7: Update notification preferences to SMS order updates only
Task 8: Change account password using current password and re-login
